title: 120 Botanical SVG Bundle Fine Line Floral Designs Birth Flowers Herbs Leaves Cricut Silhouette Commercial Use
description:
Instantly elevate your creative projects with 120 hand-crafted fine-line botanical SVG designs — perfect for Cricut, Silhouette, laser engraving, wedding stationery, and tattoo flash sheets.

✿ WHAT'S INCLUDED ✿

• 120 unique botanical SVG files organised into 10 curated categories:
  - 12 Birth Flowers (one for each month — Carnation through Narcissus)
  - 16 Botanical Stems (eucalyptus, fern, monstera, ivy & more)
  - 10 Wildflowers (poppy, daisy, cornflower, lavender & more)
  - 12 Herbs (rosemary, thyme, basil, sage, mint & more)
  - 12 Tropical Leaves (palm, banana leaf, bird of paradise & more)
  - 12 Succulents & Cacti (echeveria, aloe, prickly pear & more)
  - 12 Garden Roses (climbing, cabbage, bud, hip & more)
  - 12 Decorative Corners & Borders
  - 10 Wreaths & Frames
  - 12 Single Blooms (peony, dahlia, magnolia, tulip & more)
• All files in clean SVG format — infinitely scalable
• Organised folder structure for easy browsing

✿ PERFECT FOR ✿

• Cricut & Silhouette vinyl decals, stickers, and HTV projects
• Wedding invitations, save-the-dates, and place cards
• Tattoo flash sheets and body art reference
• Laser engraving on wood, glass, leather
• Journal covers, planner stickers, and scrapbooking
• Logo design, branding, and packaging
• Wall art prints and nursery decor

✿ HOW TO USE ✿

1. Download the ZIP file after purchase
2. Unzip to find 10 neatly organised folders
3. Import any SVG into Cricut Design Space, Silhouette Studio, Adobe Illustrator, Inkscape, or any SVG-compatible software
4. Resize freely — vectors never lose quality!

✿ FEATURES ✿

• Fine-line minimalist style — on-trend for 2025-2026
• Clean paths optimised for cutting machines
• Consistent stroke weight across all designs
• Commercial licence included (up to 500 units per design)

✿ FAQ ✿

Q: Can I use these for commercial products?
A: Yes! Commercial licence is included for up to 500 physical units per design. For unlimited commercial use, message us for an extended licence.

Q: Will these work with my Cricut/Silhouette?
A: Absolutely. All SVGs are optimised for cutting machines with clean, single-path lines.

Q: Can I change the colours?
A: Yes! SVG files can be recoloured in any design software including free tools like Inkscape.

✿ PLEASE NOTE ✿

• This is a DIGITAL DOWNLOAD — no physical item will be shipped
• Files are delivered as a ZIP archive containing SVG files
• Due to the digital nature, no refunds are offered — but we're here to help with any issues!
• Colours may vary slightly depending on your screen settings

© PurpleOcaz — Thank you for supporting our small creative studio!
